definitions.text: A country in Central Europe. Official name: Republic of Poland. Capital and largest city: Warsaw.

A number of places in the United States: An unincorporated community in Cass Township, Clay County, Indiana. A town in Androscoggin County, Maine. A town in Chautauqua County, New York. A village in Herkimer County, New York. A village and township in Mahoning County, Ohio. An unincorporated community in Eaton, Brown County, Wisconsin.
